name: Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCAF)
description: The Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCAF) validates practitioners can make informed decisions about tradeoffs when implementing real-world solutions with Claude. Tests foundational knowledge across Claude Code, Agent SDK, Claude API, and MCP.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document contains practice exam questions related to the **Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCAF)** certification.

### Certification context
This certification validates knowledge in:
- Agentic architecture and orchestration (agentic loops, multi-agent systems)
- Tool design and MCP integration
- Claude Code configuration and workflows
- Prompt engineering and structured output
- Context management and reliability

### Purpose
This document compiles practice exam questions for study and review. Each question includes:
- The complete original question statement from the practice exam
- Justification explaining the concept behind the correct answer and the errors in the incorrect alternatives.

### Learning objective
Serve as reference material for discussion and deeper understanding of architecture concepts with Claude and MCP.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCAF)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCAF)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration
domains.description: Domain 1 (27%): Design agentic loops, orchestrate multi-agent systems, configure subagent patterns, implement multi-step workflows.

domains.name: Tool Design & MCP Integration
domains.description: Domain 2 (18%): Design tool interfaces, implement MCP error responses, distribute tools across agents, integrate MCP servers.

domains.name: Claude Code Configuration & Workflows
domains.description: Domain 3 (20%): Configure CLAUDE.md files, create slash commands, apply path-specific rules, integrate into CI/CD.

domains.name: Prompt Engineering & Structured Output
domains.description: Domain 4 (20%): Design precise prompts, apply few-shot prompting, enforce structured output, implement validation loops.

domains.name: Context Management & Reliability
domains.description: Domain 5 (15%): Manage conversation context, design escalation patterns, implement error propagation, handle uncertainty.
